strengths: Currently Staff-level full-stack engineer with 15+ years experience actively delivering in TypeScript/Node.js, exceeding the mid-senior requirement by both seniority and direct stack match
Actively developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, addressing a specialized requirement that is typically difficult to source in candidates
Demonstrates deep architectural thinking and craftsmanship culture—built testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), led TDD adoption, designed systems handling millions of requests per second
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; despite strong Node.js background, hands-on experience with this specific framework requires validation
Kubernetes not clearly articulated; Docker and containerization foundation is present but orchestration-specific hands-on depth is unclear
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience at Altom exists but is not prominent, potentially requiring ramp-up for Kotlin-based backend services

key_factors.factor: Active AI-agent development and MCP framework expertise
Proven craftsmanship culture and architectural systems thinking

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate: he currently operates at a seniority level above the requirement with hands-on production experience directly in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His current role includes active AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development—a rare, specialized capability directly matching a stated requirement. His 15-year career demonstrates consistent architectural rigor, testing discipline (built testing frameworks, led TDD adoption), and systems thinking (high-throughput microservices). Identified gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, Kubernetes, Kotlin) are framework and tool specifics; his strong fundamentals and documented learning velocity across diverse technologies suggest rapid mastery.
